shopeeFixer.statusOkMsg: The label has no detected bitmap errors. Ready to print.
shopeeFixer.statusWarnMsg: The label contains large GFA images. This may cause slowness on Shopee.
shopeeFixer.statusErrorMsg: Incompatible GFB bitmap for Shopee detected. Fix before printing.
shopeeFixer.invalidFormatMsg: Incomplete or invalid ZPL code. Make sure to copy the entire original text (must contain ^XA and ^XZ).

tools.bulkSplitterDesc: Split chained ZPL labels into multiple images.

editor.placeholder: Paste your ZPL code here or drag .txt / .zpl files

ui.privacyGuarantee: Privacy Guaranteed: Processing is 100% volatile. No label data or ZPL code is stored on our servers.

explore.title: Explore Tools
explore.toolZplPdfDesc: Convert ZPL code to 4x6 or A4 PDF.

zplToPdf.title: ZPL to PDF Converter | ZPLMaster
zplToPdf.h1: Free Online ZPL to PDF Converter
zplToPdf.desc: Convert raw ZPL code into print-ready PDF files in seconds. Supports 4x6 thermal and A4 formats, directly in your browser — no installation required. 100% free and private.

shopeeFix.title: Shopee ZPL Image Fix | ZPLMaster
shopeeFix.desc: Paste your Shopee label ZPL code, the system will diagnose bitmap errors and auto-fix the code with one click. Free and 100% in-browser.

validator.title: ZPL Syntax Validator | ZPLMaster
validator.desc: Analyze your ZPL code and identify structural errors, semantic issues and formatting best practices. Free and 100% in-browser.

validator.statusValidMsg: No errors or warnings found. The code is ready to use.
validator.E004: Graphic referenced (`^XGR`) without definition (`~DGR`) in the code
validator.W001: Inline image (`^GFA`) without page dimensions (`^PW`/`^LL`) — may misconfigure the printer
validator.W002: `^GFB` format detected — incompatible with Shopee and some printers
validator.W003: Image origin (`^FO`) is not at 0,0 — may cause visual offset
validator.W004: {count} label blocks (`^XA...^XZ`) detected in the code
validator.W005: Open label block (`^XA`) without a matching closing tag (`^XZ`)
validator.I001: Recommended: define explicit page dimensions (`^PW` and `^LL`)
validator.I002: Consider defining media handling behavior with `^MN`
validator.I003: Print quantity (`^PQ`) is not 1 — verify if intentional
